item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya setuju dengan pendapatnya bahwa hak individu harus diperhatikan.

notes: Agent A starts with clear support for society-over-individual, then shifts by turn 3 toward individual-rights consideration and ends on a balance frame. Agent B starts by rejecting societal priority, then moves toward a balance/stability frame by the final turn. Both agents converge toward a middle position rather than one fully adopting the other's opening view.
